root_text.an9.22:1.1: “Tayo ca, bhikkhave, assakhaḷuṅke desessāmi tayo ca purisakhaḷuṅke tayo ca assaparasse tayo ca purisaparasse tayo ca bhadde assājānīye tayo ca bhadde purisājānīye.
root_text.an9.22:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco assakhaḷuṅko javasampanno hoti, na vaṇṇasampanno, na ārohapariṇāhasampanno.
root_text.an9.22:2.3: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco assakhaḷuṅko javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca, na ārohapariṇāhasampanno.
root_text.an9.22:2.4: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco assakhaḷuṅko javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an9.22:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco purisakhaḷuṅko javasampanno hoti, na vaṇṇasampanno, na ārohapariṇāhasampanno.
root_text.an9.22:3.3: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco purisakhaḷuṅko javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca, na ārohapariṇāhasampanno.
root_text.an9.22:3.4: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco purisakhaḷuṅko javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an9.22:4.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, purisakhaḷuṅko javasampanno hoti, na vaṇṇasampanno na ārohapariṇāhasampanno?
root_text.an9.22:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu ‘idaṁ dukkhan’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti, ‘ayaṁ dukkhasamudayo’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti, ‘ayaṁ dukkhanirodho’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti, ‘ayaṁ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti.
root_text.an9.22:4.4: Abhidhamme kho pana abhivinaye pañhaṁ puṭṭho saṁsādeti, no vissajjeti.
root_text.an9.22:4.8: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, purisakhaḷuṅko javasampanno hoti, na vaṇṇasampanno na ārohapariṇāhasampanno.
root_text.an9.22:5.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, purisakhaḷuṅko javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca, na ārohapariṇāhasampanno?
root_text.an9.22:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu ‘idaṁ dukkhan’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti …pe… ‘ayaṁ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti.
root_text.an9.22:5.4: Abhidhamme kho pana abhivinaye pañhaṁ puṭṭho vissajjeti, no saṁsādeti.
root_text.an9.22:5.8: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, purisakhaḷuṅko javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca, na ārohapariṇāhasampanno.
root_text.an9.22:6.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, purisakhaḷuṅko javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca?
root_text.an9.22:6.2: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu ‘idaṁ dukkhan’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti …pe… ‘ayaṁ dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā’ti yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti.
root_text.an9.22:6.4: Abhidhamme kho pana abhivinaye pañhaṁ puṭṭho vissajjeti, no saṁsādeti.
root_text.an9.22:6.8: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, purisakhaḷuṅko javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an9.22:7.3: javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an9.22:8.3: javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an9.22:9.2: javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca?
root_text.an9.22:9.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu pañcannaṁ orambhāgiyānaṁ saṁyojanānaṁ parikkhayā opapātiko hoti, tattha parinibbāyī anāvattidhammo tasmā lokā.
root_text.an9.22:9.5: Abhidhamme kho pana abhivinaye pañhaṁ puṭṭho vissajjeti, no saṁsādeti.
root_text.an9.22:9.9: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, purisaparasso javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an9.22:10.1: Katame ca, bhikkhave, tayo bhaddā assājānīyā?
root_text.an9.22:10.3: javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an9.22:10.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo bhaddā assājānīyā.
root_text.an9.22:11.1: Katame ca, bhikkhave, tayo bhaddā purisājānīyā?
root_text.an9.22:11.3: javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an9.22:12.2: javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca?
root_text.an9.22:12.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu āsavānaṁ khayā anāsavaṁ cetovimuttiṁ paññāvimuttiṁ diṭṭheva dhamme sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja viharati.
root_text.an9.22:12.5: Abhidhamme kho pana abhivinaye pañhaṁ puṭṭho vissajjeti, no saṁsādeti.
root_text.an9.22:12.9: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, bhaddo purisājānīyo javasampanno ca hoti vaṇṇasampanno ca ārohapariṇāhasampanno ca.
root_text.an9.22:12.10: Ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo bhaddā purisājānīyā”ti.

translation_text.an9.22:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you about three wild colts and three wild people; three excellent horses and three excellent people; and three fine thoroughbred horses and three fine thoroughbred people.
translation_text.an9.22:1.2: Listen and apply your mind well, I will speak.
translation_text.an9.22:2.1: And what are the three wild colts?
translation_text.an9.22:2.2: One wild colt is fast, but not beautiful or well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:2.3: Another wild colt is fast and beautiful, but not well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:2.4: While another wild colt is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:2.5: These are the three wild colts.
translation_text.an9.22:3.1: And what are the three wild people?
translation_text.an9.22:3.2: One wild person is fast, but not beautiful or well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:3.3: Another wild person is fast and beautiful, but not well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:3.4: While another wild person is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:4.1: And how is a wild person fast, but not beautiful or well proportioned?
translation_text.an9.22:4.2: It’s when a mendicant truly understands: ‘This is suffering’ … ‘This is the origin of suffering’ … ‘This is the cessation of suffering’ … ‘This is the practice that leads to the cessation of suffering’.
translation_text.an9.22:4.3: This is how they’re fast, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:4.4: But when asked a question about the teaching or training, they falter without answering.
translation_text.an9.22:4.5: This is how they’re not beautiful, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:4.6: And they don’t receive robes, almsfood, lodgings, and medicines and supplies for the sick.
translation_text.an9.22:4.7: This is how they’re not well proportioned, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:4.8: This is how a wild person is fast, but not beautiful or well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:5.1: And how is a wild person fast and beautiful, but not well proportioned?
translation_text.an9.22:5.2: They truly understand: ‘This is suffering’ … ‘This is the origin of suffering’ … ‘This is the cessation of suffering’ … ‘This is the practice that leads to the cessation of suffering’.
translation_text.an9.22:5.3: This is how they’re fast, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:5.4: When asked a question about the teaching or training, they answer without faltering.
translation_text.an9.22:5.5: This is how they’re beautiful, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:5.6: But they don’t receive robes, almsfood, lodgings, and medicines and supplies for the sick.
translation_text.an9.22:5.7: This is how they’re not well proportioned, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:5.8: This is how a wild person is fast and beautiful, but not well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:6.1: And how is a wild person fast, beautiful, and well proportioned?
translation_text.an9.22:6.2: They truly understand: ‘This is suffering’ … ‘This is the origin of suffering’ … ‘This is the cessation of suffering’ … ‘This is the practice that leads to the cessation of suffering’.
translation_text.an9.22:6.3: This is how they’re fast, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:6.4: When asked a question about the teaching or training, they answer without faltering.
translation_text.an9.22:6.5: This is how they’re beautiful, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:6.6: They receive robes, almsfood, lodgings, and medicines and supplies for the sick.
translation_text.an9.22:6.7: This is how they’re well proportioned, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:6.8: This is how a wild person is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:6.9: These are the three wild people.
translation_text.an9.22:7.1: And what are the three excellent horses?
translation_text.an9.22:7.3: is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:7.4: These are the three excellent horses.
translation_text.an9.22:8.1: What are the three excellent people?
translation_text.an9.22:8.3: is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:9.1: And how is an excellent person …
translation_text.an9.22:9.3: It’s when a mendicant, with the ending of the five lower fetters, is reborn spontaneously. They’re extinguished there, and are not liable to return from that world.
translation_text.an9.22:9.4: This is how they’re fast, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:9.5: When asked a question about the teaching or training, they answer without faltering.
translation_text.an9.22:9.6: This is how they’re beautiful, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:9.7: They receive robes, almsfood, lodgings, and medicines and supplies for the sick.
translation_text.an9.22:9.8: This is how they’re well proportioned, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:9.9: This is how an excellent person is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:9.10: These are the three excellent people.
translation_text.an9.22:10.1: And what are the three fine thoroughbred horses?
translation_text.an9.22:10.3: is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:10.4: These are the three fine thoroughbred horses.
translation_text.an9.22:11.1: And what are the three fine thoroughbred people?
translation_text.an9.22:11.3: is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:12.1: And how is a fine thoroughbred person …
translation_text.an9.22:12.3: It’s a mendicant who realizes the undefiled freedom of heart and freedom by wisdom in this very life. And they live having realized it with their own insight due to the ending of defilements.
translation_text.an9.22:12.4: This is how they’re fast, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:12.5: When asked a question about the teaching or training, they answer without faltering.
translation_text.an9.22:12.6: This is how they’re beautiful, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:12.7: They receive robes, almsfood, lodgings, and medicines and supplies for the sick.
translation_text.an9.22:12.8: This is how they’re well proportioned, I say.
translation_text.an9.22:12.9: This is how a fine thoroughbred person is fast, beautiful, and well proportioned.
translation_text.an9.22:12.10: These are the three fine thoroughbred people.”

variant_text.an9.22:1.1: assaparasse → assasadasse (bj, sya-all, pts1ed) | purisaparasse → purisasadasse (bj, sya-all, pts1ed)
variant_text.an9.22:1.2: (…) → (sādhukaṁ manasikarotha bhāsissāmīti. evaṁ bhanteti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ bhagavā etadavoca.) (bj, pts1ed)
